name: Louise Macdonald Milliner
note: Acclaimed Melbourne milliner of 30+ years making couture fashion hats and bonnets from her Nicholas Building studio, also a leading millinery teacher.

name: Richard Nylon Millinery
note: One of Australia's most talented milliners, creating hand-manipulated sculptural couture headwear described as wearable art from his Fitzroy studio.

name: Serena Lindeman Millinery
note: Melbourne milliner offering racewear and casual made-to-order headwear for men and women plus millinery workshops.

name: Kim Fletcher Millinery
note: Internationally renowned Melbourne milliner making quirky, dramatic handmade felt and straw headwear since 1993.

name: Peter Jago Exclusive Hats
note: Flamboyant West Melbourne milliner renowned for exotic, exclusive couture hat creations.

name: Waltraud Reiner – Hatmobile
note: Millinery veteran of 30+ years running the travelling Hatmobile hat-making workshops across Victoria and beyond.

name: Wendy Scully Millinery
note: Bespoke race and bridal millinery created in her Collins Street CBD atelier boutique with personal design consultations.

name: Lauren J Ritchie Millinery
note: Bespoke hats for race days, weddings and everyday wear made in her studio in the Manchester Unity Building.

name: Felicity Northeast Millinery
note: Award-winning couture race hats and fashion headwear handcrafted with traditional techniques, by appointment at Fitzroy and Mornington Peninsula studios.

name: Rachel Henry Millinery
note: Melbourne milliner producing ready-to-wear to couture ladies headwear for racing, weddings and formal occasions; MAA Design Award winner.

name: Rebecca Share Millinery
note: Designer hats and headwear from a Melbourne/Geelong milliner for races and special occasions.

name: Michelle Pagonis Millinery
note: Handmade bridal headpieces and race-day millinery meticulously handcrafted in Melbourne.

name: Millinery by Karin
note: Melbourne-based couture milliner Karin Goodman making handmade women's hats and headpieces for races, weddings and events.

name: Tooali Millinery
note: Melbourne milliner Tracey Tau creating handmade designer hats and headwear.

name: Feather & Drum Custom Hat Co
note: Traditional hatmaker Cat Leahy hand-blocks felt hat bodies on vintage wooden blocks and hand-stitches them in her High Country shop.

name: Carlisle Hats
note: Traditional felt and straw hats hand-made in Melbourne with custom bespoke fitting services.

name: City Hatters
note: Historic hat shop trading under the clocks at Flinders Street Station since 1910, specialising in Akubra and quality men's and women's hats with fitting.

name: Neil Grigg Millinery
note: Sydney master milliner hand-crafting couture hats, fascinators and headpieces for races, weddings and celebrity clients from his Paddington studio.

name: Abigail Fergusson Millinery – The Milliner's Closet
note: Sydney milliner making bespoke racewear, bridal and occasion headwear from a studio paired with a curated fashion boutique.

name: Kathryn Lee Millinery
note: Sydney milliner and hatmaker specialising in custom, bespoke and couture hats, headbands and bridal headwear.

name: Rosie Boylan
note: Newtown milliner offering bespoke commissions and ready-to-wear hats with expert styling and fitting; noted film and theatre hatmaker.

name: Embellish Atelier
note: Designer millinery by Catherine Kelly making bespoke hats and headpieces and running hat-making workshops in Rozelle, Sydney.

name: Bronwyn Shooks Millinery
note: Sydney theatrical milliner making custom headwear for stage and screen productions including Harry Potter and Phantom of the Opera.

name: The Sydney Millinery Co
note: Sydney milliner Carole Maher making custom hats and headwear.

name: Strand Hatters
note: Long-established Sydney hat shop in the Strand Arcade specialising in Akubra, Panamas and quality hats with expert fitting.

name: Akubra
note: Iconic Australian felt-hat maker crafting traditional fur-felt bush hats in Kempsey by master hatters since 1876.

name: Angela Sullivan – Millinery By Ange
note: Brisbane milliner making custom hats and headpieces for races and special occasions.

name: Meg Rafter Millinery
note: Brisbane milliner making bespoke hats and luxury headwear worn throughout the racing community.

name: Dezignz by Maree
note: Bespoke millinery handmade in Brisbane, by appointment at a boutique studio in Newport, North Brisbane.

name: Meerkat Millinery
note: Brisbane bespoke millinery with a shopfront studio in Ashgrove open set hours and by appointment.

name: Sandy Aslett Milliner
note: Custom-made bespoke hats and fascinators handcrafted in her Sunshine Coast studio.

name: Ugo Kennedy Hats
note: North Queensland custom hatmaker hand-making one-of-a-kind felt and leather hats in his Townsville studio and shop.

name: Studio Hats (Lorraine Gill Creations)
note: Adelaide milliner Lorraine Gill creates one-off millinery from her Highbury studio, from cloches to Melbourne Cup confections.

name: Julie Fleming Milliner
note: English-trained milliner working from an 1851 stables studio within the JamFactory artisan studios at Seppeltsfield Winery.

name: Bonnetry Hats
note: Adelaide milliner Jo Honan making bespoke hats and headwear from Mile End.

name: Julie Anne Lucas Millinery
note: Perth milliner creating designer ladies racing hats and bridal headpieces with a bespoke service.

name: Hat Ensemble (Sue Cummuskey)
note: Perth milliner hand-making individually designed hats and headpieces from ethically sourced materials.

name: Reny Kestel Millinery
note: Perth milliner creating luxurious designer hats, headpieces and bridal millinery.

name: Stephanie Munro Millinery
note: Mandurah milliner specialising in hats, headbands, crowns and fascinators with bespoke pieces for weddings and race season.

name: Grizzly Hatters
note: Family-run Hobart hatmaker hand-crafting fedoras, tweed caps and Australian leather bush hats in Tasmania since 1995.

name: Miss Haidee Millinery
note: Hobart's hat shop with a working studio, home to 300+ hats and headpieces; owner trained at the British School of Millinery in London.

name: Cessiah Alice Millinery
note: Hobart milliner making designer hats and headpieces.

name: Mason Hats
note: Tasmanian label creating 100% Australian merino wool hats, straw hats, Panamas and bucket hats for women, men and kids.

name: Christine Waring Designer Millinery
note: Long-standing Canberra milliner hand-crafting and hand-stitching unique race-day and occasion hats from her Ainslie studio.

name: Rachael Henson Millinery
note: Canberra milliner making made-to-measure millinery for races, weddings and brides since 1998.

name: Cynthia Jones-Bryson Millinery
note: ACT-region milliner making custom hats and headwear for races and occasions.

name: Peacock Millinery
note: Darwin milliner Belinda Osborne making bespoke race-day, wedding and couture headwear known for structural, contemporary designs.

name: Helen Rose Millinery
note: Darwin milliner Helen Wilkinson making custom hats and headpieces.
